description: Perform a Linear Mixed Effects Model (LMM) analysis on the 'Sleep' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Sleep.csv) to estimate the effect of the drug 'group' on 'extra' sleep hours, controlling for participant 'ID' as a random intercept. Save the analysis as /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Sleep_LMM.jasp. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/lmm_report.txt including the model's AIC value, the Fixed Effect estimate (coefficient) for 'group' (specifically the difference for group 2 vs group 1), and a one-sentence conclusion.
